stories.title: Top moments and more from the third round of the P...
stories.summary: Here are the best sights and sounds from Saturday's action at Aronimink Golf Club.

stories.title: 'Fantastic round' earns Rahm share of PGA lead
stories.summary: After Saturday's third round, Ryder Cup teammates Jon Rahm and Ludvig Aberg were part of a five-way tie for the top spot at warm and blustery Aronimink Golf Club, where the PGA Championship heads into its final round on Sunday with a leaderboard logjam.

stories.title: Rory rallies, gets 'a little bit closer' at PGA
stories.summary: Rory McIlroy, the two-time reigning Masters champion who authored a slow start to the PGA Championship, climbed back into contention in the season's second major on Saturday, telling reporters that he's proud of the rally, but "there's one more day left."

stories.title: Chargers OC McDaniel in NFL accelerator program
stories.summary: The NFL's revamped accelerator program features several notable head coaching and general manager candidates -- and even a head coach from 2025 in Mike McDaniel.

stories.title: Sources: Alonso agrees to become Chelsea coach
stories.summary: Xabi Alonso is set to be confirmed as Chelsea head coach within the next 24 hours, sources have told ESPN, after agreeing to terms to take charge at Stamford Bridge.
